leadText: The Heat Rock (Japanese: あついいわ Hot Rock) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It extends the duration of harsh sunlight.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the Pokémon holding this item creates harsh sunlight with the moves Sunny Day or Max Flare , or the Abilities Drought or Orichalcum Pulse , it lasts eight turns instead of five turns. (Prior to Generation VI , it has no effect on Drought, which creates harsh sunlight with indefinite length in those games.) In the Generation VII games, if harsh sunlight has its duration extended by the Heat Rock, the turn counter on the user interface for these effects will indicate that it lasts for 8 turns for the player whose Pokémon used the move, while it will display that it lasts for 5 turns for their opponent. After 5 turns of harsh sunlight have passed, the user interface will display that it lasts for 8 turns for both players.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods D P Pt Underground HG SS Trade PW Icy Mountain Rd. B W B2 W2 Route 8 (once per day, in the daytime) DW * Icy Cave X Y Route 13 , Terminus Cave Round rocks OR AS Weather Institute S M US UM Malie City Battle Royal Dome (48 BP ) Sw Sh Hammerlocke Bridge Field ( Digging Duo ) Sw Sh IA Loop Lagoon Sw Sh CT Hidden recurring item ( Tunnel to the Top ) BD SP Grand Underground S V Delibird Presents ( Cascarrafa Branch, after earning 4 Gym Badges ) Sparkling overworld item ( East Province (Area Three) )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Pokémon hold item that extends the duration of the move Sunny Day used by the holder. HG SS B W B2 W2 A Pokémon held item that extends the duration of the move Sunny Day used by the holder. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of the move Sunny Day when used by the holder. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder changes the weather to harsh sunlight, the sunlight will persist for longer than usual.
